evidence_refs.ref: NVDA FY26Q1 earnings call 2026-05-28 ~37min mark, networking attach-rate commentary
evidence_refs.verification_query: NVIDIA FY26Q1 Spectrum-X networking revenue attach rate guidance

why_consensus_missed: Street's last networking revision predated the FY26Q1 call where management first quantified the Spectrum-X attach rate on Blackwell racks; consensus still models networking as a low-attach accessory line.
red_team_challenge: If the attach rate management cited is order-mix rather than installed-base durable, the +$7B premium to consensus compresses to <$2B by FY27.
